creator: brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
text:
I've upgraded the port to match the latest greatest source at
	the master site.  It now offers support to make procmailrc 
	files.  I dig this program for newbies who don't understand how
	to make rc files or why they're useful!  I also added an install
	for the HTML docs, fixed some patches, added new ones and did 
	all the tests (make install, make clean, make package, pkg_add,
	and pkg_delete) and all went through okay on my machine.

How-To-Repeat: 
	apply below (kinda large) patch  - most of the length of this 
	diff is the PLISTs.  I just started over when I made mine 
	rather than try to add stuff to the original.  Sorry.  If you
	would prefer the updated port instead of applying this diff,
	it's available at:

	ftp://peloton.physics.montana.edu/pub/dotfile-2.2.tar.gz

	Thanks to Bill Fenner for helping me figure out how to get 
	the second configure script to run!
